name: Chocolate Fruit Tart
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Vanilla wafer crumbs (about 45 wafers; crushed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Chocolate Crumb Crust.
2. In a bowl, beat cream cheese and sugar. Add cocoa, milk, and vanilla; beat until smooth and well blended. Spread mixture over crust; refrigerate until cream cheese mixture is chilled.
3. Arrange fruit on cream cheese mixture, working from outside toward center until surface is covered. Heat preserves until thin; cool slightly. Spoon preserves over fruit. Refrigerate 1 to 2 hours before serving. Cut into wedges.
8 to 10 servings.
